MINI MINUTES:

The Court has been informed that Mr. Meis has passed away. See Pham v. Wagner Litho Machinery Co. (1985) 172 Cal.App.3d 966, 973. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185

Notice Of Motion To Lift Stay

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFFs GERALDINE GOODELL, SALLY SERVIDIO and ANNA ENEA's Motion To Lift Stay is continued to be heard on February 13, 2013. The opposing party shall provide a courtesy copy of the opposition with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date by January 14, 2013. See San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B. The Court has copies of the moving papers.
